title: Axor Lab Experiment
description: Binds what runs to how it's compared: a scenario/bench set, the conditions to compare, repeats, the agent artifact, and the experiment type. Conditions live HERE, not in a scenario — the same scenario is reused across conditions.

bench_id.description: optional: an ordered bench instead of a loose scenario set

conditions.description: ≥2 to compare; each differs in exactly the axis under study

repeats.description: n per condition; statistics.md governs the unit of analysis

comparison_design.description: how the two conditions are compared. matched_pairs (McNemar) is valid ONLY when the agent's behavior is fixed by scenario+seed (a deterministic/replayed agent). A live model is sampled independently per condition → independent_samples (a two-proportion comparison, reported as exploratory). If omitted, the design is inferred from the agent.
